repos.name: ruvnet/RuView
repos.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
repos.descriptionZh: π RuView 将商用 WiFi 信号转化为实时空间智能、生命体征监测和存在检测 - 所有这些都无需视频像素。

repos.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
repos.descriptionZh: 真正工程师的技能。直接来自我的 .claude 目录。

repos.name: colbymchenry/codegraph
repos.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
repos.descriptionZh: Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 和 OpenCode 的预索引代码知识图 — 更少的标记、更少的工具调用、100% 本地化

repos.name: facebook/pyrefly
repos.description: A fast type checker and language server for Python
repos.descriptionZh: Python 的快速类型检查器和语言服务器

repos.name: BigBodyCobain/Shadowbroker
repos.description: Open-source intelligence for the global theater. Track everything from the corporate/private jets of the wealthy, and spy satellites, to seismic events in one unified interface. Hook an AI agent up to have it parse through data and find previously unseen correlations. The knowledge is available to all but rarely aggregated in the open, until now.
repos.descriptionZh: 全球战区的开源情报。在一个统一的界面中跟踪从富人的公司/私人飞机、间谍卫星到地震事件的一切信息。连接人工智能代理，让它解析数据并找到以前未见过的相关性。这些知识可供所有人使用，但迄今为止很少公开汇总。

repos.name: millionco/react-doctor

repos.descriptionZh: 你的代理写了糟糕的 React。这抓住了它

repos.descriptionZh: 有效的代理技能框架和软件开发方法。
